notes/stuff

i listened to the voices.. i made an alpha version. its the same as the omega one. because of how omegaverse commonly is, id suggest using alpha/beta, but its open so you can do whatever you want lol.. bot should be mostly the same except he has a knot instead of a vajayjay😘

i might specialize in omegaverse stuff tbh, i havent seen much fluff of it in janitor which is really shitty tbh... i love omegaverse rut/heat comfort instead of just pure raw fucking. i might make a smut version too tho. idk lmaoo

im somehow kinda motivated to write books again, but i doubt any would get finished nor like ever updated.. like i think the last time i made a bot before the omegaverse was in like december.. LOL. dont count on me for constant uploads 😭😭

after testing notes: oh my god hes actually so sweet.. in the first chat i tested i didnt imply any a/o/b thing and guys... he was SO SWEET. it lead into a bit of 𝓯𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂 (because of how i coded ruts to be) and he was so adamant on consent... consent makes my sha boing boing point to he CLOUDS!! 🤑🤑🤑 i think u guys will like this 😋

if there are any issues that are NOT related to the jllm then pls feel free to write about it in the comments, ill see if i can fix it 😘 bot makers have little to no control over the jllm unfortunately, so its hard to stop it from acting out.
